description.value:
War-chants inscribed as vow-letters — Strupemål war-chanters tattoo vows into their own throats and then transcribe them into armor; the gorget carries the resonance of the chant, pushing back fear the moment it tries to take root.

Effect: You gain an edge on saving throws against becoming frightened. Once per encounter, when you would become frightened, you can make an immediate saving throw before the condition applies.

Rules: Frightened; Edge; Saving Throw; Encounter.

project.prerequisites: A gorget or suit of armor of exceptional quality; a transcribed war-chant from a Strupemål war-chanter
